summary: Excellent crew‑mic soundboard capture of a spring ’83/summer ’84 show, though the review gives no details about the performance itself.
review: The reviewer rates this tape five stars and notes that it was patched directly from the crew’s microphones during the spring‑'83 and summer‑'84 tours, indicating a high‑quality soundboard source. No specific songs or musical moments are mentioned, so the show’s musical strengths cannot be assessed beyond the reviewer’s enthusiasm.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is a perfect five‑star rating praising the crew‑mic source; lacking performance detail keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Patched directly from crew microphones, implying clear and balanced capture; no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or song performance were provided.
